name_en: GG Horsebit: The brand that tops the list for a reason. When everyone has the GG monogram full leather series, the 1955 series adds a denim member. A low-key yet fashionable spokesperson, GG really knows how to do it, a perfect fit for the spring/summer collection. Lightweight, spacious, and easy to match—casual or goddess style, another must-have.
name_cn:

Size: 25*18*8cm
